    70‚Üí@dataclass
    71‚Üíclass CandidateBasic:
    72‚Üí    """Basic candidate information from search results."""
    73‚Üí    maimai_id: str
    74‚Üí    name: str
    75‚Üí    title: str
    76‚Üí    company: str
    77‚Üí    location: Optional[str] = None
    78‚Üí    profile_url: Optional[str] = None
    79‚Üí
    80‚Üí
    81‚Üíasync def search_candidates(
    82‚Üí    keywords: str,
    83‚Üí    company: Optional[tuple] = None,
    84‚Üí    location: Optional[str] = None,
    85‚Üí    pages: int = 1,
    86‚Üí    start_page: int = 1,
    87‚Üí    browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None
    88‚Üí) -> List[CandidateBasic]:
    89‚Üí    """
    90‚Üí    Search for candidates on Maimai.
    91‚Üí
    92‚Üí    Args:
    93‚Üí        keywords: Search keywords (e.g., "È´òÁ∫ßÂâçÁ´ØÂ∑•Á®ãÂ∏à")
    94‚Üí        company: Filter by company names, tuple of strings (optional)
    95‚Üí        location: Filter by location (optional)
    96‚Üí        pages: Number of pages to scrape (default 1)
    97‚Üí        start_page: First page number to scrape (default 1)
    98‚Üí        browser: Browser manager instance
    99‚Üí
   100‚Üí    Returns:
   101‚Üí        List of CandidateBasic objects
   102‚Üí
   103‚Üí    Raises:
   104‚Üí        RateLimitExceededError: If rate limit exceeded
   105‚Üí        SelectorNotFoundError: If page elements not found
   106‚Üí    """
   107‚Üí    # Validate inputs
   108‚Üí    validate_keywords(keywords)
   109‚Üí
   110‚Üí    if browser is None:
   111‚Üí        browser = get_browser_manager()
   112‚Üí
   113‚Üí    config = get_config()
   114‚Üí    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
   115‚Üí    db_manager = get_db_manager()
   116‚Üí
   117‚Üí    # Ensure logged in
   118‚Üí    await ensure_logged_in(browser)
   119‚Üí
   120‚Üí    all_candidates: List[CandidateBasic] = []
   121‚Üí
   122‚Üí    with Progress(
   123‚Üí        SpinnerColumn(),
   124‚Üí        TextColumn("[progress.description]{task.description}"),
   125‚Üí        console=console
   126‚Üí    ) as progress:
   127‚Üí
   128‚Üí        end_page = start_page + pages
   129‚Üí        for page_num in range(start_page, end_page):
   130‚Üí            task = progress.add_task(f"Searching page {page_num}/{end_page - 1}...", total=None)
   131‚Üí
   132‚Üí            try:
   133‚Üí                # Check rate limit (waits through min-interval)
   134‚Üí                await async_check_rate_limit('search')
   135‚Üí
   136‚Üí                # Build search URL
   137‚Üí                params = {
   138‚Üí                    'type': 'contact',
   139‚Üí                    'query': keywords,
   140‚Üí                    'highlight': 'true'
   141‚Üí                }
   142‚Üí                if page_num > 1:
   143‚Üí                    params['page'] = str(page_num)
   144‚Üí
   145‚Üí                search_url = f"{MAIMAI_SEARCH_URL}?{urlencode(params)}"
   146‚Üí
   147‚Üí                page = browser.page
   148‚Üí
   149‚Üí                # Navigate to search page
   150‚Üí                await retry_navigation(page, search_url, wait_until='domcontentloaded')
   151‚Üí
   152‚Üí                # Wait for page load
   153‚Üí                await async_random_delay('page_load')
   154‚Üí
   155‚Üí                # Check for captcha
   156‚Üí                await check_captcha(page, report_to_rate_limiter=True)
   157‚Üí
   158‚Üí                # Click "‰∫∫ËÑâ" tab to show contact results
   159‚Üí                try:
   160‚Üí                    renmai_tab = await page.query_selector('text="‰∫∫ËÑâ"')
   161‚Üí                    if renmai_tab:
   162‚Üí                        await renmai_tab.click()
   163‚Üí                        logger.info("Clicked '‰∫∫ËÑâ' tab")
   164‚Üí                        await async_random_delay('action')
   165‚Üí                        # Wait for content to load
   166‚Üí                        await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
   167‚Üí                except Exception as e:
   168‚Üí                    logger.debug(f"Could not click ‰∫∫ËÑâ tab: {e}")
   169‚Üí
   170‚Üí                # Simulate human behavior
   171‚Üí                await human_scroll(page, 'down', distance=300)
   172‚Üí                await async_random_delay('action')
   173‚Üí
   174‚Üí                # Extract candidates from this page
   175‚Üí                candidates = await _extract_search_results(page, config)
   176‚Üí
   177‚Üí                if not candidates:
   178‚Üí                    logger.info(f"No results found on page {page_num}")
   179‚Üí                    await browser.screenshot(f"search_debug_page{page_num}")
   180‚Üí                    progress.update(task, description=f"Page {page_num}: No results")
   181‚Üí                    # Allow one empty page (could be transient), break on second consecutive
   182‚Üí                    if page_num > start_page and not all_candidates:
   183‚Üí                        # First page had no results either ‚Äî genuinely empty
   184‚Üí                        break
   185‚Üí                    continue
   186‚Üí
   187‚Üí                # Filter out non-R&D roles
   188‚Üí                before_rd_filter = len(candidates)
   189‚Üí                candidates = [c for c in candidates if not _is_non_rd_title(c.title)]
   190‚Üí                rd_filtered = before_rd_filter - len(candidates)
   191‚Üí                if rd_filtered > 0:
   192‚Üí                    logger.info(f"Filtered out {rd_filtered} non-R&D candidates")
   193‚Üí
   194‚Üí                # Apply filters if specified
   195‚Üí                if company:
   196‚Üí                    company_lower = [cn.lower() for cn in company]
   197‚Üí                    candidates = [c for c in candidates if any(cn in c.company.lower() for cn in company_lower)]
   198‚Üí
   199‚Üí                if location:
   200‚Üí                    candidates = [c for c in candidates if c.location and location.lower() in c.location.lower()]
   201‚Üí
   202‚Üí                all_candidates.extend(candidates)
   203‚Üí                progress.update(task, description=f"Page {page_num}: Found {len(candidates)} candidates")
   204‚Üí
   205‚Üí                # Log the action
   206‚Üí                rate_limiter.log_action('search', {
   207‚Üí                    'keywords': keywords,
   208‚Üí                    'page': page_num,
   209‚Üí                    'results': len(candidates)
   210‚Üí                })
   211‚Üí
   212‚Üí                # Save candidates to database
   213‚Üí                _save_candidates_to_db(db_manager, candidates, keywords)
   214‚Üí
   215‚Üí                # Delay before next page
   216‚Üí                if page_num < end_page - 1:
   217‚Üí                    await async_random_delay('page_load')
   218‚Üí
   219‚Üí            except (BrowserError, SessionExpiredError):
   220‚Üí                raise  # Critical errors must propagate
   221‚Üí            except Exception as e:
   222‚Üí                logger.error(f"Error on page {page_num}: {e}")
   223‚Üí                progress.update(task, description=f"Page {page_num}: Error - {str(e)[:30]}")
   224‚Üí                # Take screenshot for debugging
   225‚Üí                await browser.screenshot(f"search_error_page{page_num}")
   226‚Üí                continue
   227‚Üí
   228‚Üí    # Log search to history
   229‚Üí    _log_search_history(db_manager, keywords, company, location, pages, len(all_candidates))
   230‚Üí
   231‚Üí    console.print(f"[green]Search complete. Found {len(all_candidates)} candidates.[/green]")
   232‚Üí    return all_candidates
   233‚Üí
   234‚Üí
   235‚Üíasync def _extract_search_results(page: Page, config) -> List[CandidateBasic]:
   236‚Üí    """
   237‚Üí    Extract candidate information from search results page.
   238‚Üí
   239‚Üí    Args:
   240‚Üí        page: Playwright page instance
   241‚Üí        config: Config instance
   242‚Üí
   243‚Üí    Returns:
   244‚Üí        List of CandidateBasic objects
   245‚Üí    """
   246‚Üí    candidates = []
   247‚Üí
   248‚Üí    try:
   249‚Üí        # Wait for page to be fully loaded
   250‚Üí        await page.wait_for_load_state('networkidle', timeout=10000)
   251‚Üí    except Exception:
   252‚Üí        pass  # Continue even if networkidle times out
   253‚Üí
   254‚Üí    # Wait for actual result cards to render (avoid "ÊêúÁ¥¢Êï∞ÊçÆ‰∏≠..." race condition)
   255‚Üí    try:
   256‚Üí        await page.wait_for_function(
   257‚Üí            '''() => {
   258‚Üí                const body = document.body ? document.body.innerText : '';
   259‚Üí                if (body.includes('ÊêúÁ¥¢Êï∞ÊçÆ‰∏≠') || body.includes('ÂäÝËΩΩ‰∏≠')) return false;
   260‚Üí                // Check for avatar images indicating result cards are rendered
   261‚Üí                const imgs = document.querySelectorAll('img');
   262‚Üí                let avatarCount = 0;
   263‚Üí                for (const img of imgs) {
   264‚Üí                    const rect = img.getBoundingClientRect();
   265‚Üí                    if (rect.width >= 20 && rect.width <= 100 && rect.height >= 20 && rect.height <= 100) {
   266‚Üí                        avatarCount++;
   267‚Üí                    }
   268‚Üí                }
   269‚Üí                return avatarCount >= 1;
   270‚Üí            }''',
   271‚Üí            timeout=8000,
   272‚Üí        )
   273‚Üí    except Exception:
   274‚Üí        logger.debug("Timed out waiting for result cards to render, proceeding with extraction")
   275‚Üí
   276‚Üí    try:
   277‚Üí        # Strategy: Extract candidates by finding avatar images and their associated text
   278‚Üí        candidates_data = await page.evaluate('''() => {
   279‚Üí            const candidates = [];
   280‚Üí            const seenNames = new Set();
   281‚Üí
   282‚Üí            // Find all images that look like avatars
   283‚Üí            const images = document.querySelectorAll('img');
   284‚Üí
   285‚Üí            for (const img of images) {
   286‚Üí                // Skip large images (probably not avatars)
   287‚Üí                const rect = img.getBoundingClientRect();
   288‚Üí                if (rect.width > 100 || rect.height > 100) continue;
   289‚Üí                if (rect.width < 20 || rect.height < 20) continue;
   290‚Üí
   291‚Üí                // Find parent container (the card)
   292‚Üí                let card = img.parentElement;
   293‚Üí                for (let i = 0; i < 8 && card; i++) {
   294‚Üí                    const cardRect = card.getBoundingClientRect();
   295‚Üí                    // Look for a reasonable card size
   296‚Üí                    if (cardRect.width > 200 && cardRect.height > 50 && cardRect.height < 200) {
   297‚Üí                        break;
   298‚Üí                    }
   299‚Üí                    card = card.parentElement;
   300‚Üí                }
   301‚Üí
   302‚Üí                if (!card) continue;
   303‚Üí
   304‚Üí                // Get all text nodes from card, preserving order
   305‚Üí                const textParts = [];
   306‚Üí                const walker = document.createTreeWalker(card, NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT, null, false);
   307‚Üí                while (walker.nextNode()) {
   308‚Üí                    const text = walker.currentNode.textContent.trim();
   309‚Üí                    if (text && text.length > 0 && text.length < 100) {
   310‚Üí                        textParts.push(text);
   311‚Üí                    }
   312‚Üí                }
   313‚Üí
   314‚Üí                // Parse candidate info from text parts
   315‚Üí                // Pattern: Name, Activity time, Company+Position, Industry|Department
   316‚Üí                let name = '';
   317‚Üí                let company = '';
   318‚Üí                let title = '';
   319‚Üí                let industry = '';
   320‚Üí
   321‚Üí                // Compound job title patterns (longer patterns first for greedy match)
   322‚Üí                const jobPatterns = [
   323‚Üí                    // Compound titles with prefix modifiers
   324‚Üí                    /(?:È´òÁ∫ß|ËµÑÊ∑±|È¶ñÂ∏≠|ÂàùÁ∫ß|‰∏≠Á∫ß|senior|junior|staff|principal|lead)?\s*(?:ÂâçÁ´Ø|ÂêéÁ´Ø|ÂÖ®ÊÝà|web|Web|iOS|Android|Java|Python|Go|C\+\+|PHP|.NET|ÁÆóÊ≥ï|Êï∞ÊçÆ|AI|Êú∫Âô®Â≠¶‰πÝ|Ê∑±Â∫¶Â≠¶‰πÝ|NLP|Â§ßÊï∞ÊçÆ|‰∫ëËÆ°ÁÆó|DevOps|SRE|ÂÆâÂÖ®|ÊµãËØï|ÂµåÂÖ•Âºè|ÁßªÂä®Á´Ø|ÂÆ¢Êà∑Á´Ø|ÊúçÂä°Á´Ø|Âå∫ÂùóÈìæ|ÂÖ∑Ë∫´Êô∫ËÉΩ|Ëá™Âä®È©æÈ©∂|Êú∫Âô®‰∫∫)?\s*(?:Â∑•Á®ãÂ∏à|ÂºÄÂèë|Êû∂ÊûÑÂ∏à|‰∏ìÂÆ∂|ÊäÄÊúØÁªèÁêÜ|ÊäÄÊúØÊÄªÁõë|ÊäÄÊúØË¥üË¥£‰∫∫|Tech\s*Lead)/i,
   325‚Üí                    // Management titles
   326‚Üí                    /(?:ÊäÄÊúØ|‰∫ßÂìÅ|ËøêËê•|Â∏ÇÂú∫|ÈîÄÂîÆ|‰∫∫Âäõ|Ë¥¢Âä°|Ë°åÊîø|È°πÁõÆ|ÁÝîÂèë)?\s*(?:ÊÄªÁõë|ÁªèÁêÜ|‰∏ªÁÆ°|Ë¥üË¥£‰∫∫|VP|ÊÄªË£Å|ÂâØÊÄª|Âêà‰ºô‰∫∫|ÂàõÂßã‰∫∫|Ëë£‰∫ã|CEO|CTO|COO|CFO|CMO|CHO|CIO)/i,
   327‚Üí                    // Other roles
   328‚Üí                    /(?:‰∫ßÂìÅ|UI|UX|‰∫§‰∫í|ËßÜËßâ)?\s*(?:ËÆæËÆ°Â∏à|ÂàÜÊûêÂ∏à|È°æÈóÆ|ËøêËê•|Âä©ÁêÜ|ÂÆû‰πÝÁîü?)/i,
   329‚Üí                ];
   330‚Üí
   331‚Üí                // Patterns for text that should be skipped
   332‚Üí                const skipPatterns = [
   333‚Üí                    /^[+Ôºã]\s*Â•ΩÂèã$/,          // "+ Â•ΩÂèã" button
   334‚Üí                    /^\d+‰∏™ÂÖ±ÂêåÂ•ΩÂèã$/,           // "1‰∏™ÂÖ±ÂêåÂ•ΩÂèã" social label
   335‚Üí                    /^ÂÖ±ÂêåÂ•ΩÂèã/,                 // "ÂÖ±ÂêåÂ•ΩÂèã..." variants
   336‚Üí                    /^Â∑≤ÂÖ≥Ê≥®$/,                  // "Â∑≤ÂÖ≥Ê≥®" button
   337‚Üí                    /^Ê∑ªÂäÝÂ•ΩÂèã$/,                // "Ê∑ªÂäÝÂ•ΩÂèã" button
   338‚Üí                    /^ÂÖ≥Ê≥®$/,                    // "ÂÖ≥Ê≥®" button
   339‚Üí                    /^Â•ΩÂèã$/,                    // "Â•ΩÂèã" label
   340‚Üí                    /^[|ÔΩú¬∑]$/,                  // separators
   341‚Üí                ];
   342‚Üí
   343‚Üí                const isSkippable = (text) => {
   344‚Üí                    if (skipPatterns.some(p => p.test(text))) return true;
   345‚Üí                    // Activity time
   346‚Üí                    if (/Â§©Ââç|Â∞èÊó∂Ââç|ÂàÜÈíüÂâç|ÂàöÂàö|Ê¥ªË∑É|Âú®Á∫ø/.test(text)) return true;
   347‚Üí                    return false;
   348‚Üí                };
   349‚Üí
   350‚Üí                for (let i = 0; i < textParts.length; i++) {
   351‚Üí                    const part = textParts[i];
   352‚Üí
   353‚Üí                    if (isSkippable(part)) continue;
   354‚Üí
   355‚Üí                    // First short text (2-15 chars, pure CJK/letters) is likely the name
   356‚Üí                    if (!name && part.length >= 2 && part.length <= 15) {
   357‚Üí                        if (/^[\u4e00-\u9fa5a-zA-Z¬∑\s]+$/.test(part)) {
   358‚Üí                            name = part;
   359‚Üí                            continue;
   360‚Üí                        }
   361‚Üí                    }
   362‚Üí
   363‚Üí                    // After name, next substantial text is company+position
   364‚Üí                    if (name && !company && part.length > 2) {
   365‚Üí                        // Try to split company and position using regex patterns
   366‚Üí                        let splitDone = false;
   367‚Üí                        for (const pattern of jobPatterns) {
   368‚Üí                            const match = part.match(pattern);
   369‚Üí                            if (match && match.index > 0) {
   370‚Üí                                company = part.substring(0, match.index).trim();
   371‚Üí                                title = match[0].trim();
   372‚Üí                                splitDone = true;
   373‚Üí                                break;
   374‚Üí                            }
   375‚Üí                        }
   376‚Üí                        if (!splitDone) {
   377‚Üí                            company = part;
   378‚Üí                        }
   379‚Üí                        continue;
   380‚Üí                    }
   381‚Üí
   382‚Üí                    // Next part is industry|department info
   383‚Üí                    if (name && company && !industry && part.length > 2) {
   384‚Üí                        industry = part;
   385‚Üí                        // If title wasn't split from company, use industry as fallback context
   386‚Üí                        if (!title) {
   387‚Üí                            title = industry;
   388‚Üí                        }
   389‚Üí                        break;
   390‚Üí                    }
   391‚Üí                }
   392‚Üí
   393‚Üí                // Skip if no name found or premium placeholder
   394‚Üí                if (!name) continue;
   395‚Üí                if (name === 'ËÑâËÑâÈ´ò‰ª∑ÂÄº‰∫∫ËÑâ') continue;
   396‚Üí
   397‚Üí                // Extract user ID from DOM patterns on card and ancestor elements.
   398‚Üí                // Two patterns exist:
   399‚Üí                //   1. contactcard_{numeric_id} ‚Äî on ancestors (colleagues layout)
   400‚Üí                //   2. member_entry_{numeric_id} ‚Äî on descendants (standard layout)
   401‚Üí                let userId = '';
   402‚Üí
   403‚Üí                // Check ancestors for numeric contactcard_{id}
   404‚Üí                let el = card;
   405‚Üí                while (el) {
   406‚Üí                    const elId = el.id || '';
   407‚Üí                    const ccMatch = elId.match(/^contactcard_(\d+)$/);
   408‚Üí                    if (ccMatch) {
   409‚Üí                        userId = ccMatch[1];
   410‚Üí                        break;
   411‚Üí                    }
   412‚Üí                    el = el.parentElement;
   413‚Üí                }
   414‚Üí
   415‚Üí                // Check descendants for member_entry_{id} (most common pattern)
   416‚Üí                if (!userId) {
   417‚Üí                    const meEl = card.querySelector('[id^="member_entry_"]');
   418‚Üí                    if (meEl) {
   419‚Üí                        const meMatch = meEl.id.match(/^member_entry_(\d+)$/);
   420‚Üí                        if (meMatch) {
   421‚Üí                            userId = meMatch[1];
   422‚Üí                        }
   423‚Üí                    }
   424‚Üí                }
   425‚Üí
   426‚Üí                // Also check ancestor descendants for contactcard with numeric ID
   427‚Üí                if (!userId) {
   428‚Üí                    const ccEl = card.querySelector('[id^="contactcard_"]');
   429‚Üí                    if (ccEl) {
   430‚Üí                        const ccMatch = ccEl.id.match(/^contactcard_(\d+)$/);
   431‚Üí                        if (ccMatch) {
   432‚Üí                            userId = ccMatch[1];
   433‚Üí                        }
   434‚Üí                    }
   435‚Üí                }
   436‚Üí
   437‚Üí                // Use real user_id as maimai_id when available, fall back to hash
   438‚Üí                let maimaiId;
   439‚Üí                if (userId) {
   440‚Üí                    maimaiId = 'mm_' + userId;
   441‚Üí                } else {
   442‚Üí                    const idSource = (name || '') + '|' + (company || '') + '|' + (title || '');
   443‚Üí                    let hash = 0;
   444‚Üí                    for (let j = 0; j < idSource.length; j++) {
   445‚Üí                        const ch = idSource.charCodeAt(j);
   446‚Üí                        hash = ((hash << 5) - hash) + ch;
   447‚Üí                        hash = hash & hash; // Convert to 32bit integer
   448‚Üí                    }
   449‚Üí                    maimaiId = 'mm_' + Math.abs(hash).toString(16).padStart(8, '0');
   450‚Üí                }
   451‚Üí
   452‚Üí                // Skip duplicates based on the computed ID
   453‚Üí                if (seenNames.has(maimaiId)) continue;
   454‚Üí                seenNames.add(maimaiId);
   455‚Üí
   456‚Üí                // Build profile URL from user ID when available
   457‚Üí                let profileUrl = '';
   458‚Üí                if (userId) {
   459‚Üí                    profileUrl = 'https://maimai.cn/contact/detail/' + userId + '?dstu=' + userId;
   460‚Üí                }
   461‚Üí
   462‚Üí                // Fallback: extract profile URL from <a> tags inside the card
   463‚Üí                if (!profileUrl) {
   464‚Üí                    let fallbackUrl = '';
   465‚Üí
   466‚Üí                    // First: check <a> ancestors between img and card
   467‚Üí                    let ancestor = img.parentElement;
   468‚Üí                    while (ancestor && ancestor !== card) {
   469‚Üí                        if (ancestor.tagName === 'A' && ancestor.href) {
   470‚Üí                            const href = ancestor.getAttribute('href') || '';
   471‚Üí                            if (href.includes('/profile/detail') || href.includes('/contact/detail/') || href.includes('/u/') || href.includes('egid=') || href.includes('dstu=')) {
   472‚Üí                                profileUrl = href.startsWith('http') ? href : 'https://maimai.cn' + href;
   473‚Üí                                break;
   474‚Üí                            }
   475‚Üí                        }
   476‚Üí                        ancestor = ancestor.parentElement;
   477‚Üí                    }
   478‚Üí
   479‚Üí                    // Second: search all <a> descendants inside the card
   480‚Üí                    if (!profileUrl) {
   481‚Üí                        const links = card.querySelectorAll('a[href]');
   482‚Üí                        for (const link of links) {
   483‚Üí                            const href = link.getAttribute('href') || '';
   484‚Üí                            if (href.includes('/profile/detail') || href.includes('/contact/detail/') || href.includes('/u/') || href.includes('egid=') || href.includes('dstu=')) {
   485‚Üí                                profileUrl = href.startsWith('http') ? href : 'https://maimai.cn' + href;
   486‚Üí                                break;
   487‚Üí                            }
   488‚Üí                            if (!fallbackUrl && href && !href.startsWith('javascript:') && (href.startsWith('/') || href.includes('maimai.cn'))) {
   489‚Üí                                fallbackUrl = href.startsWith('http') ? href : 'https://maimai.cn' + href;
   490‚Üí                            }
   491‚Üí                        }
   492‚Üí                    }
   493‚Üí                    if (!profileUrl && fallbackUrl) {
   494‚Üí                        profileUrl = fallbackUrl;
   495‚Üí                    }
   496‚Üí                }
   497‚Üí
   498‚Üí                // Extract location: look for remaining short text parts after name/company/title
   499‚Üí                // Common patterns: city names like "Âåó‰∫¨", "‰∏äÊµ∑", "Ê∑±Âú≥" etc.
   500‚Üí                let location = '';
   501‚Üí                const locationPatterns = /^(Âåó‰∫¨|‰∏äÊµ∑|ÂπøÂ∑û|Ê∑±Âú≥|Êù≠Â∑û|ÊàêÈÉΩ|Âçó‰∫¨|Ê≠¶Ê±â|Ë•øÂÆâ|ËãèÂ∑û|ÈïøÊ≤ô|Â§©Ê¥•|ÈáçÂ∫Ü|ÈÉëÂ∑û|‰∏úËéû|ÈùíÂ≤õ|Â§ßËøû|ÂÆÅÊ≥¢|Âé¶Èó®|ÂêàËÇ•|‰ΩõÂ±±|Á¶èÂ∑û|ÊòÜÊòé|ÊµéÂçó|ÁèÝÊµ∑|ÊóÝÈî°|Â∏∏Â∑û|Êµ∑Â§ñ|ËøúÁ®ã|È¶ôÊ∏Ø|Âè∞Âåó|Êñ∞ÂäÝÂù°|ÁæéÂõΩ|Êó•Êú¨|Èü©ÂõΩ|Ëã±ÂõΩ|ÂÖ®ÂõΩ|ÂÖ∂‰ªñ)/;
   502‚Üí                for (let i = 0; i < textParts.length; i++) {
   503‚Üí                    const part = textParts[i];
   504‚Üí                    if (part === name || part === company || part === title || part === industry) continue;
   505‚Üí                    if (isSkippable(part)) continue;
   506‚Üí                    if (locationPatterns.test(part) && part.length <= 10) {
   507‚Üí                        location = part;
   508‚Üí                        break;
   509‚Üí                    }
   510‚Üí                }
   511‚Üí
   512‚Üí                candidates.push({
   513‚Üí                    name: name,
   514‚Üí                    title: title || '',
   515‚Üí                    company: company || '',
   516‚Üí                    maimai_id: maimaiId,
   517‚Üí                    profile_url: profileUrl,
   518‚Üí                    location: location,
   519‚Üí                });
   520‚Üí            }
   521‚Üí
   522‚Üí            return candidates;
   523‚Üí        }''')
   524‚Üí
   525‚Üí        logger.info(f"JavaScript extraction found {len(candidates_data)} candidates")
   526‚Üí
   527‚Üí        for data in candidates_data:
   528‚Üí            if data.get('name'):
   529‚Üí                candidates.append(CandidateBasic(
   530‚Üí                    maimai_id=data.get('maimai_id', ''),
   531‚Üí                    name=data.get('name', ''),
   532‚Üí                    title=data.get('title', ''),
   533‚Üí                    company=data.get('company', ''),
   534‚Üí                    location=data.get('location', ''),
   535‚Üí                    profile_url=data.get('profile_url', '')
   536‚Üí                ))
   537‚Üí
   538‚Üí        # For candidates missing profile_url, try extracting from contactcard DOM
   539‚Üí        missing_url = [c for c in candidates if not c.profile_url]
   540‚Üí        if missing_url:
   541‚Üí            logger.info(f"{len(missing_url)} candidates missing profile_url, searching contactcard DOM")
   542‚Üí            for c in missing_url:
   543‚Üí                try:
   544‚Üí                    profile_url = await _click_avatar_for_profile_url(page, c.name, c.company)
   545‚Üí                    if profile_url:
   546‚Üí                        c.profile_url = profile_url
   547‚Üí                except Exception as e:
   548‚Üí                    logger.debug(f"Contactcard lookup failed for '{c.name}': {e}")
   549‚Üí
   550‚Üí        # Fallback: Strategy 1 - Find all profile links directly
   551‚Üí        profile_links = []
   552‚Üí        if not candidates:
   553‚Üí            profile_links = await page.query_selector_all('a[href*="/contact/"], a[href*="/u/"], a[href*="egid="], a[href*="profile"]')
   554‚Üí
   555‚Üí        if profile_links and not candidates:
   556‚Üí            logger.debug(f"Found {len(profile_links)} profile links")
   557‚Üí
   558‚Üí            seen_ids = set()
   559‚Üí            for link in profile_links:
   560‚Üí                try:
   561‚Üí                    href = await link.get_attribute('href')
   562‚Üí                    if not href:
   563‚Üí                        continue
   564‚Üí
   565‚Üí                    # Extract maimai_id from URL
   566‚Üí                    maimai_id = None
   567‚Üí                    if '/contact/detail/' in href:
   568‚Üí                        maimai_id = href.split('/contact/detail/')[-1].split('?')[0].split('/')[0]
   569‚Üí                    elif '/u/' in href:
   570‚Üí                        maimai_id = href.split('/u/')[-1].split('?')[0].split('/')[0]
   571‚Üí
   572‚Üí                    if not maimai_id or maimai_id in seen_ids:
   573‚Üí                        continue
   574‚Üí                    seen_ids.add(maimai_id)
   575‚Üí
   576‚Üí                    # Get name from link text
   577‚Üí                    name = await link.inner_text()
   578‚Üí                    name = name.strip()
   579‚Üí                    if not name or len(name) > 50:  # Skip if no name or too long (probably not a name)
   580‚Üí                        continue
   581‚Üí
   582‚Üí                    # Try to get parent container for more info
   583‚Üí                    parent = await link.evaluate_handle('el => el.closest("div, li, article") || el.parentElement.parentElement')
   584‚Üí
   585‚Üí                    title = ""
   586‚Üí                    company = ""
   587‚Üí
   588‚Üí                    if parent:
   589‚Üí                        # Get all text content and try to parse
   590‚Üí                        try:
   591‚Üí                            full_text = await parent.inner_text()
   592‚Üí                            lines = [l.strip() for l in full_text.split('\n') if l.strip()]
   593‚Üí
   594‚Üí                            # Usually: name, then title/company info
   595‚Üí                            for line in lines:
   596‚Üí                                if line == name:
   597‚Üí                                    continue
   598‚Üí                                if 'Â•ΩÂèã' in line or 'ÂÖ≥Ê≥®' in line:
   599‚Üí                                    continue
   600‚Üí                                if not title and len(line) < 50:
   601‚Üí                                    title = line
   602‚Üí                                elif not company and len(line) < 50:
   603‚Üí                                    company = line
   604‚Üí                                    break
   605‚Üí                        except Exception:
   606‚Üí                            pass
   607‚Üí
   608‚Üí                    profile_url = href if href.startswith('http') else f"https://maimai.cn{href}"
   609‚Üí
   610‚Üí                    candidates.append(CandidateBasic(
   611‚Üí                        maimai_id=maimai_id,
   612‚Üí                        name=name,
   613‚Üí                        title=title,
   614‚Üí                        company=company,
   615‚Üí                        profile_url=profile_url
   616‚Üí                    ))
   617‚Üí
   618‚Üí                except Exception as e:
   619‚Üí                    logger.debug(f"Failed to extract from link: {e}")
   620‚Üí                    continue
   621‚Üí
   622‚Üí        # Strategy 2: If no links found, try button-based detection
   623‚Üí        if not candidates:
   624‚Üí            logger.debug("Trying button-based detection")
   625‚Üí            buttons = await page.query_selector_all('button:has-text("Â•ΩÂèã"), button:has-text("ÂÖ≥Ê≥®")')
   626‚Üí
   627‚Üí            for button in buttons:
   628‚Üí                try:
   629‚Üí                    parent = await button.evaluate_handle('el => el.closest("div, li, article")')
   630‚Üí                    if not parent:
   631‚Üí                        continue
   632‚Üí
   633‚Üí                    # Find link in parent
   634‚Üí                    link = await parent.query_selector('a[href*="/contact"], a[href*="/u/"]')
   635‚Üí                    if link:
   636‚Üí                        href = await link.get_attribute('href')
   637‚Üí                        name = await link.inner_text()
   638‚Üí
   639‚Üí                        maimai_id = None
   640‚Üí                        if '/contact/detail/' in href:
   641‚Üí                            maimai_id = href.split('/contact/detail/')[-1].split('?')[0]
   642‚Üí                        elif '/u/' in href:
   643‚Üí                            maimai_id = href.split('/u/')[-1].split('?')[0]
   644‚Üí
   645‚Üí                        if maimai_id and name:
   646‚Üí                            candidates.append(CandidateBasic(
   647‚Üí                                maimai_id=maimai_id,
   648‚Üí                                name=name.strip(),
   649‚Üí                                title="",
   650‚Üí                                company="",
   651‚Üí                                profile_url=href
   652‚Üí                            ))
   653‚Üí                except Exception:
   654‚Üí                    continue
   655‚Üí
   656‚Üí        # Filter out premium placeholder profiles
   657‚Üí        before_filter = len(candidates)
   658‚Üí        candidates = [c for c in candidates if c.name not in PREMIUM_PLACEHOLDER_NAMES]
   659‚Üí        filtered_count = before_filter - len(candidates)
   660‚Üí        if filtered_count > 0:
   661‚Üí            logger.info(f"Filtered out {filtered_count} premium placeholder profiles")
   662‚Üí
   663‚Üí        logger.info(f"Extracted {len(candidates)} candidates from page")
   664‚Üí
   665‚Üí    except Exception as e:
   666‚Üí        logger.error(f"Error extracting search results: {e}")
   667‚Üí
   668‚Üí    return candidates
   669‚Üí

   671‚Üídef _save_candidates_to_db(db_manager, candidates: List[CandidateBasic], source_search: str) -> None:
   672‚Üí    """
   673‚Üí    Save or update candidates in database.
   674‚Üí
   675‚Üí    Args:
   676‚Üí        db_manager: Database manager instance
   677‚Üí        candidates: List of candidates to save
   678‚Üí        source_search: Search keywords that found these candidates
   679‚Üí    """
   680‚Üí    try:
   681‚Üí        with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   682‚Üí            for c in candidates:
   683‚Üí                # Check if candidate exists by maimai_id
   684‚Üí                existing = session.query(Candidate).filter_by(maimai_id=c.maimai_id).first()
   685‚Üí
   686‚Üí                # Also check by name+company to avoid creating duplicates with different generated IDs
   687‚Üí                if not existing:
   688‚Üí                    existing = session.query(Candidate).filter_by(
   689‚Üí                        name=c.name, company=c.company
   690‚Üí                    ).first()
   691‚Üí
   692‚Üí                if existing:
   693‚Üí                    # Update existing
   694‚Üí                    existing.name = c.name
   695‚Üí                    existing.title = c.title
   696‚Üí                    existing.company = c.company
   697‚Üí                    existing.location = c.location
   698‚Üí                    existing.profile_url = c.profile_url
   699‚Üí                else:
   700‚Üí                    # Create new
   701‚Üí                    candidate = Candidate(
   702‚Üí                        maimai_id=c.maimai_id,
   703‚Üí                        name=c.name,
   704‚Üí                        title=c.title,
   705‚Üí                        company=c.company,
   706‚Üí                        location=c.location,
   707‚Üí                        profile_url=c.profile_url,
   708‚Üí                        source_search=source_search
   709‚Üí                    )
   710‚Üí                    session.add(candidate)
   711‚Üí
   712‚Üí            logger.debug(f"Saved {len(candidates)} candidates to database")
   713‚Üí
   714‚Üí    except Exception as e:
   715‚Üí        logger.error(f"Failed to save candidates: {e}")
   716‚Üí
   717‚Üí
   718‚Üídef _log_search_history(
   719‚Üí    db_manager,
   720‚Üí    keywords: str,
   721‚Üí    company: Optional[tuple],
   722‚Üí    location: Optional[str],
   723‚Üí    pages: int,
   724‚Üí    results_count: int
   725‚Üí) -> None:
   726‚Üí    """Log search to history table."""
   727‚Üí    try:
   728‚Üí        with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   729‚Üí            history = SearchHistory(
   730‚Üí                criteria={
   731‚Üí                    'keywords': keywords,
   732‚Üí                    'company': list(company) if company else None,
   733‚Üí                    'location': location,
   734‚Üí                    'pages': pages
   735‚Üí                },
   736‚Üí                results_count=results_count
   737‚Üí            )
   738‚Üí            session.add(history)
   739‚Üí    except Exception as e:
   740‚Üí        logger.error(f"Failed to log search history: {e}")
   741‚Üí

   743‚Üíasync def _click_avatar_for_profile_url(page: Page, name: str, company: str) -> Optional[str]:
   744‚Üí    """Try to extract profile URL for a candidate from the DOM contactcard pattern.
   745‚Üí
   746‚Üí    Searches the current page for a contactcard element whose parent card
   747‚Üí    contains the candidate's name (and optionally company), then constructs
   748‚Üí    the profile URL from the extracted user ID.
   749‚Üí
   750‚Üí    Args:
   751‚Üí        page: Playwright page on the search results
   752‚Üí        name: Candidate name to match
   753‚Üí        company: Candidate company to help disambiguate
   754‚Üí
   755‚Üí    Returns:
   756‚Üí        Profile URL string, or None if not found
   757‚Üí    """
   758‚Üí    try:
   759‚Üí        user_id = await page.evaluate('''(args) => {
   760‚Üí            const { name, company } = args;
   761‚Üí            // Check contactcard_{numeric_id} ancestors
   762‚Üí            const ccElements = document.querySelectorAll('[id^="contactcard_"]');
   763‚Üí            for (const el of ccElements) {
   764‚Üí                const text = el.textContent || '';
   765‚Üí                if (!text.includes(name)) continue;
   766‚Üí                if (company && !text.includes(company)) continue;
   767‚Üí                const match = el.id.match(/^contactcard_(\\d+)$/);
   768‚Üí                if (match) return match[1];
   769‚Üí            }
   770‚Üí            // Check member_entry_{numeric_id} descendants
   771‚Üí            const meElements = document.querySelectorAll('[id^="member_entry_"]');
   772‚Üí            for (const el of meElements) {
   773‚Üí                // Walk up to find the card containing this member_entry
   774‚Üí                let card = el.parentElement;
   775‚Üí                for (let i = 0; i < 8 && card; i++) {
   776‚Üí                    const text = card.textContent || '';
   777‚Üí                    if (text.includes(name) && (!company || text.includes(company))) {
   778‚Üí                        const match = el.id.match(/^member_entry_(\\d+)$/);
   779‚Üí                        if (match) return match[1];
   780‚Üí                    }
   781‚Üí                    card = card.parentElement;
   782‚Üí                }
   783‚Üí            }
   784‚Üí            return null;
   785‚Üí        }''', {'name': name, 'company': company})
   786‚Üí
   787‚Üí        if user_id:
   788‚Üí            profile_url = f"https://maimai.cn/contact/detail/{user_id}?dstu={user_id}"
   789‚Üí            logger.info(f"Resolved profile_url for '{name}' via contactcard: {profile_url}")
   790‚Üí            return profile_url
   791‚Üí
   792‚Üí        logger.debug(f"No contactcard found for '{name}'")
   793‚Üí        return None
   794‚Üí
   795‚Üí    except Exception as e:
   796‚Üí        logger.debug(f"_click_avatar_for_profile_url error for '{name}': {e}")
   797‚Üí        return None
   798‚Üí
   799‚Üí
   800‚Üí# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   801‚Üí# Enterprise recruitment path (Path B)
   802‚Üí# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   803‚Üí
   804‚ÜíMAIMAI_HOME_URL = "https://maimai.cn"
   805‚ÜíENTERPRISE_URL_MARKER = "ent/talents/discover"
   806‚Üí
   807‚Üí
   808‚Üíasync def search_candidates_enterprise(
   809‚Üí    keywords: str,
   810‚Üí    company: Optional[tuple] = None,
   811‚Üí    pages: int = 1,
   812‚Üí    browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None,
   813‚Üí    keep_tab_open: bool = False,
   814‚Üí) -> List[CandidateBasic]:
   815‚Üí    """Search for candidates via the enterprise recruitment path.
   816‚Üí
   817‚Üí    Flow:
   818‚Üí    1. Switch to primary tab -> navigate to homepage -> click "ÊãõËÅò" tab (opens new tab)
   819‚Üí    2. Wait for enterprise page to load
   820‚Üí    3. Add keyword filter -> submit
   821‚Üí    4. Optionally add company filter
   822‚Üí    5. Extract candidates from enterprise card layout
   823‚Üí    6. For additional pages, scroll to trigger infinite scroll
   824‚Üí    7. Close enterprise tab unless keep_tab_open is True
   825‚Üí
   826‚Üí    Args:
   827‚Üí        keywords: Search keywords
   828‚Üí        company: Filter by company names (optional)
   829‚Üí        pages: Number of scroll-pages to extract
   830‚Üí        browser: Browser manager instance
   831‚Üí        keep_tab_open: If True, leave enterprise tab open (for inline messaging)
   832‚Üí
   833‚Üí    Returns:
   834‚Üí        List of CandidateBasic objects
   835‚Üí    """
   836‚Üí    validate_keywords(keywords)
   837‚Üí
   838‚Üí    if browser is None:
   839‚Üí        browser = get_browser_manager()
   840‚Üí
   841‚Üí    config = get_config()
   842‚Üí    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
   843‚Üí    db_manager = get_db_manager()
   844‚Üí
   845‚Üí    await ensure_logged_in(browser)
   846‚Üí
   847‚Üí    all_candidates: List[CandidateBasic] = []
   848‚Üí    enterprise_tab_opened = False
   849‚Üí
   850‚Üí    with Progress(
   851‚Üí        SpinnerColumn(),
   852‚Üí        TextColumn("[progress.description]{task.description}"),
   853‚Üí        console=console,
   854‚Üí    ) as progress:
   855‚Üí        task = progress.add_task("Opening enterprise recruitment...", total=None)
   856‚Üí
   857‚Üí        try:
   858‚Üí            await async_check_rate_limit("search")
   859‚Üí
   860‚Üí            # Always start from the primary tab to avoid navigating user's open content
   861‚Üí            browser.switch_to_primary_tab()
   862‚Üí            page = browser.page
   863‚Üí
   864‚Üí            # Step 1: Navigate to homepage and click ÊãõËÅò tab
   865‚Üí            await retry_navigation(page, MAIMAI_HOME_URL, wait_until="domcontentloaded")
   866‚Üí            await async_random_delay("page_load")
   867‚Üí
   868‚Üí            sel = config.get_selector("enterprise.recruitment_tab")
   869‚Üí            recruitment_tab = await page.wait_for_selector(sel, timeout=5000)
   870‚Üí            if not recruitment_tab:
   871‚Üí                raise SelectorNotFoundError(f"Could not find recruitment tab: {sel}")
   872‚Üí
   873‚Üí            # Click opens a new tab ‚Äî use BrowserManager API
   874‚Üí            await recruitment_tab.click()
   875‚Üí            page = await browser.wait_for_new_tab(timeout=15000)
   876‚Üí            enterprise_tab_opened = True
   877‚Üí
   878‚Üí            progress.update(task, description="Enterprise page loaded")
   879‚Üí
   880‚Üí            # Wait for the enterprise page URL
   881‚Üí            try:
   882‚Üí                await page.wait_for_url(
   883‚Üí                    lambda url: ENTERPRISE_URL_MARKER in url,
   884‚Üí                    timeout=15000,
   885‚Üí                )
   886‚Üí            except Exception:
   887‚Üí                logger.warning(f"Enterprise URL marker not found, current URL: {page.url}")
   888‚Üí
   889‚Üí            await async_random_delay("action")
   890‚Üí
   891‚Üí            # Step 2: Add keyword
   892‚Üí            progress.update(task, description=f"Adding keyword: {keywords}")
   893‚Üí
   894‚Üí            add_kw_sel = config.get_selector("enterprise.add_keyword_button")
   895‚Üí            add_kw_btn = await page.wait_for_selector(add_kw_sel, timeout=5000)
   896‚Üí            if add_kw_btn:
   897‚Üí                await add_kw_btn.click()
   898‚Üí                await async_random_delay("action")
   899‚Üí
   900‚Üí            kw_input_sel = config.get_selector("enterprise.keyword_input")
   901‚Üí            await page.wait_for_selector(kw_input_sel, timeout=5000)
   902‚Üí            await human_type(page, kw_input_sel, keywords)
   903‚Üí            await async_random_delay("action")
   904‚Üí
   905‚Üí            kw_submit_sel = config.get_selector("enterprise.keyword_submit")
   906‚Üí            submit_btn = await page.wait_for_selector(kw_submit_sel, timeout=3000)
   907‚Üí            if submit_btn:
   908‚Üí                await submit_btn.click()
   909‚Üí                await async_random_delay("page_load")
   910‚Üí
   911‚Üí            # Step 3: Add company filter if specified
   912‚Üí            if company:
   913‚Üí                progress.update(task, description="Adding company filter...")
   914‚Üí                add_co_sel = config.get_selector("enterprise.add_company_button")
   915‚Üí                add_co_btn = await page.wait_for_selector(add_co_sel, timeout=5000)
   916‚Üí                if add_co_btn:
   917‚Üí                    await add_co_btn.click()
   918‚Üí                    await async_random_delay("action")
   919‚Üí
   920‚Üí                co_input_sel = config.get_selector("enterprise.company_input")
   921‚Üí                for co_name in company:
   922‚Üí                    await page.wait_for_selector(co_input_sel, timeout=5000)
   923‚Üí                    await human_type(page, co_input_sel, co_name)
   924‚Üí                    await async_random_delay("action")
   925‚Üí
   926‚Üí                    # Click suggestion dropdown item
   927‚Üí                    try:
   928‚Üí                        suggestion = await page.wait_for_selector(
   929‚Üí                            f"text='{co_name}'", timeout=3000
   930‚Üí                        )
   931‚Üí                        if suggestion:
   932‚Üí                            await suggestion.click()
   933‚Üí                            await async_random_delay("action")
   934‚Üí                    except Exception:
   935‚Üí                        logger.debug(f"Company suggestion not found for: {co_name}")
   936‚Üí
   937‚Üí            # Step 4: Wait for results and extract
   938‚Üí            await page.wait_for_timeout(3000)
   939‚Üí            await check_captcha(page, report_to_rate_limiter=True)
   940‚Üí
   941‚Üí            for page_num in range(1, pages + 1):
   942‚Üí                progress.update(task, description=f"Extracting page {page_num}/{pages}...")
   943‚Üí
   944‚Üí                candidates = await _extract_enterprise_results(page)
   945‚Üí
   946‚Üí                if not candidates:
   947‚Üí                    logger.info(f"No enterprise results on page {page_num}")
   948‚Üí                    break
   949‚Üí
   950‚Üí                # Filter non-R&D roles
   951‚Üí                before_filter = len(candidates)
   952‚Üí                candidates = [c for c in candidates if not _is_non_rd_title(c.title)]
   953‚Üí                filtered = before_filter - len(candidates)
   954‚Üí                if filtered > 0:
   955‚Üí                    logger.info(f"Filtered out {filtered} non-R&D candidates")
   956‚Üí
   957‚Üí                all_candidates.extend(candidates)
   958‚Üí                progress.update(task, description=f"Page {page_num}: Found {len(candidates)} candidates")
   959‚Üí
   960‚Üí                rate_limiter.log_action("search", {
   961‚Üí                    "keywords": keywords,
   962‚Üí                    "page": page_num,
   963‚Üí                    "results": len(candidates),
   964‚Üí                    "mode": "enterprise",
   965‚Üí                })
   966‚Üí
   967‚Üí                _save_candidates_to_db(db_manager, candidates, keywords)
   968‚Üí
   969‚Üí                # Scroll for next page (infinite scroll)
   970‚Üí                if page_num < pages:
   971‚Üí                    await human_scroll(page, "down", distance=800)
   972‚Üí                    await async_random_delay("page_load")
   973‚Üí                    await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
   974‚Üí
   975‚Üí        except Exception as e:
   976‚Üí            logger.error(f"Enterprise search error: {e}")
   977‚Üí            await browser.screenshot("enterprise_search_error")
   978‚Üí            progress.update(task, description=f"Error: {str(e)[:40]}")
   979‚Üí        finally:
   980‚Üí            # Close the enterprise tab unless caller wants it open for inline messaging
   981‚Üí            if enterprise_tab_opened and not keep_tab_open:
   982‚Üí                try:
   983‚Üí                    await browser.close_current_tab()
   984‚Üí                except Exception:
   985‚Üí                    pass
   986‚Üí
   987‚Üí    _log_search_history(db_manager, keywords, company, None, pages, len(all_candidates))
   988‚Üí
   989‚Üí    console.print(f"[green]Enterprise search complete. Found {len(all_candidates)} candidates.[/green]")
   990‚Üí    return all_candidates
   991‚Üí
   992‚Üí
   993‚Üíasync def _extract_enterprise_results(page: Page) -> List[CandidateBasic]:
   994‚Üí    """Extract candidate information from enterprise recruitment results page.
   995‚Üí
   996‚Üí    The enterprise UI has a different card layout from search_center.
   997‚Üí    Uses JS-based extraction tailored to the enterprise talent cards.
   998‚Üí
   999‚Üí    Args:
  1000‚Üí        page: Playwright page instance on the enterprise results page
  1001‚Üí
  1002‚Üí    Returns:
  1003‚Üí        List of CandidateBasic objects
  1004‚Üí    """
  1005‚Üí    candidates = []
  1006‚Üí
  1007‚Üí    try:
  1008‚Üí        await page.wait_for_load_state("networkidle", timeout=10000)
  1009‚Üí    except Exception:
  1010‚Üí        pass
  1011‚Üí
  1012‚Üí    try:
  1013‚Üí        candidates_data = await page.evaluate('''() => {
  1014‚Üí            const candidates = [];
  1015‚Üí            const seenIds = new Set();
  1016‚Üí
  1017‚Üí            // Enterprise talent cards typically have a structured layout
  1018‚Üí            // Try multiple selectors for the card containers
  1019‚Üí            const cardSelectors = [
  1020‚Üí                '[class*="talent-card"]',
  1021‚Üí                '[class*="candidate-card"]',
  1022‚Üí                '[class*="recommend-card"]',
  1023‚Üí                '[class*="talent-item"]',
  1024‚Üí                '[class*="card-wrap"]',
  1025‚Üí            ];
  1026‚Üí
  1027‚Üí            let cards = [];
  1028‚Üí            for (const sel of cardSelectors) {
  1029‚Üí                cards = document.querySelectorAll(sel);
  1030‚Üí                if (cards.length > 0) break;
  1031‚Üí            }
  1032‚Üí
  1033‚Üí            // Fallback: find cards by avatar image pattern (same as search_center)
  1034‚Üí            if (cards.length === 0) {
  1035‚Üí                const images = document.querySelectorAll('img');
  1036‚Üí                const foundCards = [];
  1037‚Üí
  1038‚Üí                for (const img of images) {
  1039‚Üí                    const rect = img.getBoundingClientRect();
  1040‚Üí                    if (rect.width > 100 || rect.height > 100) continue;
  1041‚Üí                    if (rect.width < 30 || rect.height < 30) continue;
  1042‚Üí
  1043‚Üí                    let card = img.parentElement;
  1044‚Üí                    for (let i = 0; i < 8 && card; i++) {
  1045‚Üí                        const cardRect = card.getBoundingClientRect();
  1046‚Üí                        if (cardRect.width > 200 && cardRect.height > 80) {
  1047‚Üí                            break;
  1048‚Üí                        }
  1049‚Üí                        card = card.parentElement;
  1050‚Üí                    }
  1051‚Üí                    if (card) foundCards.push(card);
  1052‚Üí                }
  1053‚Üí                cards = foundCards;
  1054‚Üí            }
  1055‚Üí
  1056‚Üí            for (const card of cards) {
  1057‚Üí                const textParts = [];
  1058‚Üí                const walker = document.createTreeWalker(card, NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT, null, false);
  1059‚Üí                while (walker.nextNode()) {
  1060‚Üí                    const text = walker.currentNode.textContent.trim();
  1061‚Üí                    if (text && text.length > 0 && text.length < 100) {
  1062‚Üí                        textParts.push(text);
  1063‚Üí                    }
  1064‚Üí                }
  1065‚Üí
  1066‚Üí                let name = '';
  1067‚Üí                let company = '';
  1068‚Üí                let title = '';
  1069‚Üí
  1070‚Üí                const skipPatterns = [
  1071‚Üí                    /^Á´ãÂç≥Ê≤üÈÄö$/,
  1072‚Üí                    /^‰∏çÂêàÈÄÇ$/,
  1073‚Üí                    /^ÊÑüÂÖ¥Ë∂£$/,
  1074‚Üí                    /^‰∏çÊÑüÂÖ¥Ë∂£$/,
  1075‚Üí                    /^(\\d+\\s*)?Âπ¥/,
  1076‚Üí                    /^[|ÔΩú¬∑]$/,
  1077‚Üí                    /^Âú®Á∫ø|^Á¶ªÁ∫ø|^Ê¥ªË∑É/,
  1078‚Üí                ];
  1079‚Üí
  1080‚Üí                const isSkippable = (text) => {
  1081‚Üí                    return skipPatterns.some(p => p.test(text));
  1082‚Üí                };
  1083‚Üí
  1084‚Üí                for (let i = 0; i < textParts.length; i++) {
  1085‚Üí                    const part = textParts[i];
  1086‚Üí                    if (isSkippable(part)) continue;
  1087‚Üí
  1088‚Üí                    if (!name && part.length >= 2 && part.length <= 15) {
  1089‚Üí                        if (/^[\\u4e00-\\u9fa5a-zA-Z¬∑\\s]+$/.test(part)) {
  1090‚Üí                            name = part;
  1091‚Üí                            continue;
  1092‚Üí                        }
  1093‚Üí                    }
  1094‚Üí
  1095‚Üí                    if (name && !company && part.length > 1) {
  1096‚Üí                        company = part;
  1097‚Üí                        continue;
  1098‚Üí                    }
  1099‚Üí
  1100‚Üí                    if (name && company && !title && part.length > 1) {
  1101‚Üí                        title = part;
  1102‚Üí                        break;
  1103‚Üí                    }
  1104‚Üí                }
  1105‚Üí
  1106‚Üí                if (!name) continue;
  1107‚Üí
  1108‚Üí                const idSource = (name || '') + '|' + (company || '') + '|' + (title || '');
  1109‚Üí                let hash = 0;
  1110‚Üí                for (let j = 0; j < idSource.length; j++) {
  1111‚Üí                    const ch = idSource.charCodeAt(j);
  1112‚Üí                    hash = ((hash << 5) - hash) + ch;
  1113‚Üí                    hash = hash & hash;
  1114‚Üí                }
  1115‚Üí                const maimaiId = 'mm_' + Math.abs(hash).toString(16).padStart(8, '0');
  1116‚Üí
  1117‚Üí                if (seenIds.has(maimaiId)) continue;
  1118‚Üí                seenIds.add(maimaiId);
  1119‚Üí
  1120‚Üí                // Try to extract profile URL
  1121‚Üí                let profileUrl = '';
  1122‚Üí                const links = card.querySelectorAll('a[href]');
  1123‚Üí                for (const link of links) {
  1124‚Üí                    const href = link.getAttribute('href') || '';
  1125‚Üí                    if (href.includes('/profile/detail') || href.includes('/contact/detail/') || href.includes('dstu=') || href.includes('egid=')) {
  1126‚Üí                        profileUrl = href.startsWith('http') ? href : 'https://maimai.cn' + href;
  1127‚Üí                        break;
  1128‚Üí                    }
  1129‚Üí                }
  1130‚Üí
  1131‚Üí                candidates.push({
  1132‚Üí                    name: name,
  1133‚Üí                    title: title || '',
  1134‚Üí                    company: company || '',
  1135‚Üí                    maimai_id: maimaiId,
  1136‚Üí                    profile_url: profileUrl,
  1137‚Üí                    location: '',
  1138‚Üí                });
  1139‚Üí            }
  1140‚Üí
  1141‚Üí            return candidates;
  1142‚Üí        }''')
  1143‚Üí
  1144‚Üí        logger.info(f"Enterprise extraction found {len(candidates_data)} candidates")
  1145‚Üí
  1146‚Üí        for data in candidates_data:
  1147‚Üí            if data.get("name"):
  1148‚Üí                candidates.append(CandidateBasic(
  1149‚Üí                    maimai_id=data.get("maimai_id", ""),
  1150‚Üí                    name=data.get("name", ""),
  1151‚Üí                    title=data.get("title", ""),
  1152‚Üí                    company=data.get("company", ""),
  1153‚Üí                    location=data.get("location", ""),
  1154‚Üí                    profile_url=data.get("profile_url", ""),
  1155‚Üí                ))
  1156‚Üí
  1157‚Üí        # Filter out premium placeholders
  1158‚Üí        candidates = [c for c in candidates if c.name not in PREMIUM_PLACEHOLDER_NAMES]
  1159‚Üí
  1160‚Üí        logger.info(f"Enterprise: extracted {len(candidates)} candidates from page")
  1161‚Üí
  1162‚Üí    except Exception as e:
  1163‚Üí        logger.error(f"Error extracting enterprise results: {e}")
  1164‚Üí
  1165‚Üí    return candidates
  1166‚Üí

1‚Üí"""Profile extraction module for Maimai.
     2‚Üí
     3‚ÜíExtracts detailed candidate information from profile pages
     4‚Üíincluding education, work experience, and skills.
     5‚Üí"""
     6‚Üí
     7‚Üífrom dataclasses import dataclass, asdict, field
     8‚Üífrom typing import List, Optional, Dict, Any
     9‚Üí
    10‚Üífrom patchright.async_api import Page
    11‚Üífrom loguru import logger
    12‚Üífrom rich.console import Console
    13‚Üífrom rich.panel import Panel
    14‚Üí
    15‚Üífrom src.core.browser import BrowserManager, get_browser_manager
    16‚Üífrom src.core.anti_detection import human_scroll
    17‚Üífrom src.modules.auth import ensure_logged_in
    18‚Üífrom src.utils.config import get_config
    19‚Üífrom src.utils.rate_limiter import get_rate_limiter, async_check_rate_limit
    20‚Üífrom src.utils.delays import async_random_delay
    21‚Üífrom src.utils.retry import retry_navigation
    22‚Üífrom src.utils.validators import validate_maimai_id
    23‚Üífrom src.models.database import Candidate, get_db_manager
    24‚Üífrom src.exceptions.errors import ExtractionError
    25‚Üí
    26‚Üíconsole = Console()
    27‚Üí
    28‚Üí# Maimai profile URL template
    29‚ÜíMAIMAI_PROFILE_URL = "https://maimai.cn/contact/detail/{maimai_id}"
    30‚Üí
    31‚Üí
    32‚Üí@dataclass
    33‚Üíclass Education:
    34‚Üí    """Education history entry."""
    35‚Üí    school: str
    36‚Üí    degree: Optional[str] = None
    37‚Üí    major: Optional[str] = None
    38‚Üí    start_year: Optional[str] = None
    39‚Üí    end_year: Optional[str] = None
    40‚Üí
    41‚Üí
    42‚Üí@dataclass
    43‚Üíclass WorkExperience:
    44‚Üí    """Work experience entry."""
    45‚Üí    company: str
    46‚Üí    title: str
    47‚Üí    start_date: Optional[str] = None
    48‚Üí    end_date: Optional[str] = None
    49‚Üí    description: Optional[str] = None
    50‚Üí
    51‚Üí
    52‚Üí@dataclass
    53‚Üíclass CandidateDetail:
    54‚Üí    """Detailed candidate profile information."""
    55‚Üí    maimai_id: str
    56‚Üí    name: str
    57‚Üí    title: str
    58‚Üí    company: str
    59‚Üí    location: Optional[str] = None
    60‚Üí    profile_url: Optional[str] = None
    61‚Üí    experience_years: Optional[str] = None
    62‚Üí    education: List[Education] = field(default_factory=list)
    63‚Üí    work_experience: List[WorkExperience] = field(default_factory=list)
    64‚Üí    skills: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
    65‚Üí    basic_info: Dict[str, Any] = field(default_factory=dict)
    66‚Üí
    67‚Üí
    68‚Üíasync def extract_profile(
    69‚Üí    maimai_id: str,
    70‚Üí    browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None
    71‚Üí) -> CandidateDetail:
    72‚Üí    """
    73‚Üí    Extract detailed profile for a candidate.
    74‚Üí
    75‚Üí    Args:
    76‚Üí        maimai_id: Maimai user ID
    77‚Üí        browser: Browser manager instance
    78‚Üí
    79‚Üí    Returns:
    80‚Üí        CandidateDetail with full profile information
    81‚Üí
    82‚Üí    Raises:
    83‚Üí        RateLimitExceededError: If rate limit exceeded
    84‚Üí        ExtractionError: If profile extraction fails
    85‚Üí    """
    86‚Üí    # Validate input
    87‚Üí    validate_maimai_id(maimai_id)
    88‚Üí
    89‚Üí    if browser is None:
    90‚Üí        browser = get_browser_manager()
    91‚Üí
    92‚Üí    config = get_config()
    93‚Üí    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
    94‚Üí    db_manager = get_db_manager()
    95‚Üí
    96‚Üí    # Ensure logged in
    97‚Üí    await ensure_logged_in(browser)
    98‚Üí
    99‚Üí    # Check rate limit (waits through min-interval)
   100‚Üí    await async_check_rate_limit('view_profile')
   101‚Üí
   102‚Üí    console.print(f"[cyan]Extracting profile for ID: {maimai_id}...[/cyan]")
   103‚Üí
   104‚Üí    try:
   105‚Üí        page = browser.page
   106‚Üí        profile_url = MAIMAI_PROFILE_URL.format(maimai_id=maimai_id)
   107‚Üí
   108‚Üí        # Navigate to profile
   109‚Üí        await retry_navigation(page, profile_url, wait_until='domcontentloaded')
   110‚Üí
   111‚Üí        # Wait for page load
   112‚Üí        await async_random_delay('page_load')
   113‚Üí
   114‚Üí        # Simulate human behavior - scroll to load content
   115‚Üí        await human_scroll(page, 'down', distance=400)
   116‚Üí        await async_random_delay('action')
   117‚Üí
   118‚Üí        # Extract profile data
   119‚Üí        profile = await _extract_profile_data(page, maimai_id, profile_url, config)
   120‚Üí
   121‚Üí        # Log the action
   122‚Üí        rate_limiter.log_action('view_profile', {
   123‚Üí            'maimai_id': maimai_id,
   124‚Üí            'name': profile.name
   125‚Üí        })
   126‚Üí
   127‚Üí        # Update database
   128‚Üí        _update_candidate_in_db(db_manager, profile)
   129‚Üí
   130‚Üí        # Display summary
   131‚Üí        _display_profile_summary(profile)
   132‚Üí
   133‚Üí        return profile
   134‚Üí
   135‚Üí    except Exception as e:
   136‚Üí        logger.error(f"Error extracting profile: {e}")
   137‚Üí        await browser.screenshot(f"profile_error_{maimai_id}")
   138‚Üí        raise ExtractionError(f"Failed to extract profile for {maimai_id}: {e}")
   139‚Üí
   140‚Üí
   141‚Üíasync def _extract_profile_data(
   142‚Üí    page: Page,
   143‚Üí    maimai_id: str,
   144‚Üí    profile_url: str,
   145‚Üí    config
   146‚Üí) -> CandidateDetail:
   147‚Üí    """
   148‚Üí    Extract all profile data from page.
   149‚Üí
   150‚Üí    Args:
   151‚Üí        page: Playwright page instance
   152‚Üí        maimai_id: Candidate's Maimai ID
   153‚Üí        profile_url: Profile URL
   154‚Üí        config: Config instance
   155‚Üí
   156‚Üí    Returns:
   157‚Üí        CandidateDetail object
   158‚Üí    """
   159‚Üí    # Extract basic info

   164‚Üí        'h1',
   165‚Üí    ])
   166‚Üí
   167‚Üí    title = await _extract_text(page, [
   168‚Üí        config.get_selector('profile.title'),
   169‚Üí        '[class*="current-title"]',
   170‚Üí        '[class*="position"]',
   171‚Üí        '.job-title',
   172‚Üí    ])
   173‚Üí
   174‚Üí    company = await _extract_text(page, [
   175‚Üí        config.get_selector('profile.company'),
   176‚Üí        '[class*="current-company"]',
   177‚Üí        '[class*="company-name"]',
   178‚Üí        '.company',
   179‚Üí    ])
   180‚Üí
   181‚Üí    location = await _extract_text(page, [
   182‚Üí        config.get_selector('profile.location'),
   183‚Üí        '[class*="location"]',
   184‚Üí        '[class*="city"]',
   185‚Üí    ])
   186‚Üí
   187‚Üí    experience_years = await _extract_text(page, [
   188‚Üí        config.get_selector('profile.experience_years'),
   189‚Üí        '[class*="experience"]',
   190‚Üí        '[class*="years"]',
   191‚Üí    ])
   192‚Üí
   193‚Üí    # Extract education
   194‚Üí    education = await _extract_education(page, config)
   195‚Üí
   196‚Üí    # Extract work experience
   197‚Üí    work_experience = await _extract_work_experience(page, config)
   198‚Üí
   199‚Üí    # Extract skills
   200‚Üí    skills = await _extract_skills(page, config)

1‚Üí"""Message module for sending messages to candidates.
     2‚Üí
     3‚ÜíHandles message template rendering, interactive confirmation,
     4‚Üíand message sending with full audit trail.
     5‚Üí"""
     6‚Üí
     7‚Üíimport asyncio
     8‚Üífrom datetime import datetime
     9‚Üífrom typing import Any, Dict, List, Optional
    10‚Üí
    11‚Üíimport questionary
    12‚Üífrom patchright.async_api import Page
    13‚Üífrom loguru import logger
    14‚Üífrom rich.console import Console
    15‚Üífrom rich.panel import Panel
    16‚Üífrom rich.text import Text
    17‚Üí
    18‚Üífrom src.core.browser import BrowserManager, get_browser_manager
    19‚Üífrom src.core.anti_detection import human_type, human_click
    20‚Üífrom src.modules.auth import ensure_logged_in
    21‚Üífrom src.utils.config import get_config
    22‚Üífrom src.utils.rate_limiter import get_rate_limiter, async_check_rate_limit
    23‚Üífrom src.utils.delays import async_random_delay
    24‚Üífrom src.utils.retry import retry_navigation
    25‚Üífrom src.utils.validators import validate_maimai_id, validate_template_variables
    26‚Üífrom src.models.database import Candidate, Message, get_db_manager
    27‚Üífrom src.exceptions.errors import (
    28‚Üí    PermanentFailureError,
    29‚Üí    RateLimitExceededError,
    30‚Üí    ValidationError,
    31‚Üí)
    32‚Üí
    33‚Üíconsole = Console()
    34‚Üí
    35‚Üí# Maimai profile URL (fallback)
    36‚ÜíMAIMAI_PROFILE_URL = "https://maimai.cn/contact/detail/{maimai_id}"
    37‚Üí
    38‚Üí# Maimai chat URL - navigate directly to chat page
    39‚ÜíMAIMAI_CHAT_URL = "https://maimai.cn/bizmember/uh_chat_pc?u2={user_id}&from=pc_web_search&fr=profile"
    40‚Üí
    41‚Üí
    42‚Üídef _extract_user_id(profile_url: str) -> Optional[str]:
    43‚Üí    """Extract dstu/user_id from a Maimai profile URL for direct chat navigation.
    44‚Üí
    45‚Üí    Only returns IDs that are known to work with the chat URL (u2= parameter).
    46‚Üí    Query-param IDs (dstu, u2, egid) are reliable for chat navigation.
    47‚Üí    Path-based IDs (/contact/detail/xxx) are NOT the same as chat user IDs
    48‚Üí    and should not be used for direct chat URL construction.
    49‚Üí    """
    50‚Üí    from urllib.parse import urlparse, parse_qs
    51‚Üí    parsed = urlparse(profile_url)
    52‚Üí    params = parse_qs(parsed.query)
    53‚Üí    # Only use query parameter IDs ‚Äî these are confirmed to work with uh_chat_pc
    54‚Üí    for key in ('dstu', 'u2', 'egid'):
    55‚Üí        if key in params:
    56‚Üí            return params[key][0]
    57‚Üí    return None
    58‚Üí
    59‚Üí
    60‚Üíasync def _navigate_to_chat(
    61‚Üí    page: Page,
    62‚Üí    profile_url: Optional[str],
    63‚Üí    config,
    64‚Üí    browser: BrowserManager,
    65‚Üí    maimai_id: str,
    66‚Üí    interactive: bool = False,
    67‚Üí    discovered_selectors=None,
    68‚Üí) -> bool:
    69‚Üí    """Navigate to the chat page for a candidate.
    70‚Üí
    71‚Üí    Tries in order:
    72‚Üí    1. Extract user_id from profile_url query params ‚Üí direct chat URL
    73‚Üí    2. Navigate to profile_url, extract user_id from redirected URL ‚Üí direct chat URL
    74‚Üí    3. Click chat button on profile page as fallback
    75‚Üí
    76‚Üí    If no profile_url is provided, looks up the candidate's profile_url from DB.
    77‚Üí
    78‚Üí    Args:
    79‚Üí        page: Playwright page instance
    80‚Üí        profile_url: Candidate's profile URL (may be None)
    81‚Üí        config: Config instance
    82‚Üí        browser: Browser manager instance
    83‚Üí        maimai_id: Candidate's Maimai ID
    84‚Üí        interactive: Enable interactive selector discovery
    85‚Üí        discovered_selectors: Shared DiscoveredSelectors instance
    86‚Üí
    87‚Üí    Returns:
    88‚Üí        True if successfully navigated to chat page
    89‚Üí    """
    90‚Üí    db_manager = get_db_manager()
    91‚Üí
    92‚Üí    # Resolve profile URL from DB if not provided
    93‚Üí    if not profile_url:
    94‚Üí        with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
    95‚Üí            db_candidate = session.query(Candidate).filter_by(maimai_id=maimai_id).first()
    96‚Üí            profile_url = db_candidate.profile_url if db_candidate else None
    97‚Üí
    98‚Üí        if not profile_url:
    99‚Üí            raise PermanentFailureError(f"No profile URL for {maimai_id}")
   100‚Üí
   101‚Üí    # Try extracting user_id directly from profile URL
   102‚Üí    user_id = _extract_user_id(profile_url)
   103‚Üí    logger.debug(f"_navigate_to_chat: profile_url={profile_url!r}, extracted user_id={user_id}")
   104‚Üí
   105‚Üí    if user_id:
   106‚Üí        chat_url = MAIMAI_CHAT_URL.format(user_id=user_id)
   107‚Üí        await retry_navigation(page, chat_url, wait_until='domcontentloaded')
   108‚Üí        await async_random_delay('page_load')
   109‚Üí        return True
   110‚Üí
   111‚Üí    # Navigate to profile page, then try to extract user_id from resulting URL
   112‚Üí    logger.debug(f"_navigate_to_chat: navigating to profile {profile_url}")
   113‚Üí    await retry_navigation(page, profile_url, wait_until='domcontentloaded')
   114‚Üí    await async_random_delay('page_load')
   115‚Üí
   116‚Üí    current_url = page.url
   117‚Üí    logger.debug(f"_navigate_to_chat: landed on {current_url}")
   118‚Üí    redirected_user_id = _extract_user_id(current_url)
   119‚Üí    if redirected_user_id:
   120‚Üí        logger.info(f"Extracted user_id={redirected_user_id} from page URL, redirecting to chat")
   121‚Üí        chat_url = MAIMAI_CHAT_URL.format(user_id=redirected_user_id)
   122‚Üí        await retry_navigation(page, chat_url, wait_until='domcontentloaded')
   123‚Üí        await async_random_delay('page_load')
   124‚Üí        return True
   125‚Üí
   126‚Üí    # Fallback: click chat button on profile page
   127‚Üí    chat_button_found = await _click_chat_button(page, config)
   128‚Üí    if chat_button_found:
   129‚Üí        await async_random_delay('action')
   130‚Üí        return True
   131‚Üí
   132‚Üí    # If interactive mode, trigger selector discovery
   133‚Üí    if interactive and discovered_selectors is not None and not discovered_selectors.is_populated:
   134‚Üí        from src.modules.selector_discovery import discover_chat_page
   135‚Üí        console.print("[yellow]Chat button not found. Entering interactive discovery mode...[/yellow]")
   136‚Üí        result = await discover_chat_page(page, maimai_id, browser)
   137‚Üí        if result.is_populated:
   138‚Üí            discovered_selectors.chat_button = result.chat_button
   139‚Üí            discovered_selectors.message_input = result.message_input
   140‚Üí            discovered_selectors.send_button = result.send_button
   141‚Üí            discovered_selectors.chat_url_pattern = result.chat_url_pattern
   142‚Üí            discovered_selectors.skip_chat_button = result.skip_chat_button
   143‚Üí            discovered_selectors.is_populated = True
   144‚Üí            return True
   145‚Üí
   146‚Üí    console.print("[red]Could not find chat button[/red]")
   147‚Üí    await browser.screenshot(f"message_error_{maimai_id}")
   148‚Üí    return False
   149‚Üí
   150‚Üí
   151‚Üíasync def _handle_quick_contact(page: Page, content: str) -> Optional[bool]:
   152‚Üí    """Handle Maimai's "ÊûÅÈÄüËÅîÁ≥ª" (Quick Contact) page.
   153‚Üí
   154‚Üí    This page appears instead of regular chat for some candidates. It has a
   155‚Üí    category selector, a textarea, and a "Êèê‰∫§" (Submit) button.
   156‚Üí
   157‚Üí    Args:
   158‚Üí        page: Playwright page instance
   159‚Üí        content: Message content to send
   160‚Üí
   161‚Üí    Returns:
   162‚Üí        True if message was sent via quick contact form,
   163‚Üí        False if quick contact page was detected but sending failed,
   164‚Üí        None if this is not a quick contact page (caller should continue normal flow)
   165‚Üí    """
   166‚Üí    try:
   167‚Üí        # Detect quick contact page via page title or page content
   168‚Üí        is_quick_contact = await page.evaluate('''() => {
   169‚Üí            const title = document.title || '';
   170‚Üí            const bodyText = document.body ? document.body.innerText : '';
   171‚Üí            return title.includes('ÊûÅÈÄüËÅîÁ≥ª') || bodyText.includes('ÊûÅÈÄüËÅîÁ≥ª');
   172‚Üí        }''')
   173‚Üí
   174‚Üí        if not is_quick_contact:
   175‚Üí            return None
   176‚Üí
   177‚Üí        logger.info("Detected 'ÊûÅÈÄüËÅîÁ≥ª' (Quick Contact) page")
   178‚Üí
   179‚Üí        # Select "ÊãõËÅòÁ±ª" category if present
   180‚Üí        try:
   181‚Üí            recruit_btn = await page.wait_for_selector(
   182‚Üí                'text=ÊãõËÅòÁ±ª', timeout=3000
   183‚Üí            )
   184‚Üí            if recruit_btn:
   185‚Üí                await human_click(page, 'text=ÊãõËÅòÁ±ª')
   186‚Üí                await async_random_delay('action')
   187‚Üí                logger.debug("Selected 'ÊãõËÅòÁ±ª' category")
   188‚Üí        except Exception:
   189‚Üí            logger.debug("'ÊãõËÅòÁ±ª' category button not found, continuing")
   190‚Üí
   191‚Üí        # Find textarea and fill with message content using Playwright native fill
   192‚Üí        try:
   193‚Üí            textarea = await page.wait_for_selector('textarea', timeout=5000)
   194‚Üí            if not textarea:
   195‚Üí                logger.warning("Quick contact: textarea not found")
   196‚Üí                return False
   197‚Üí        except Exception:
   198‚Üí            logger.warning("Quick contact: textarea not found (timeout)")
   199‚Üí            return False
   200‚Üí
   201‚Üí        # Clear and fill using Playwright's native API (avoids Emunium issues)
   202‚Üí        await textarea.click()
   203‚Üí        await textarea.fill('')
   204‚Üí        await textarea.fill(content)
   205‚Üí        await async_random_delay('action')
   206‚Üí        logger.debug("Filled quick contact textarea")
   207‚Üí
   208‚Üí        # Click "Êèê‰∫§" (Submit) button ‚Äî race all selectors in parallel via JS,
   209‚Üí        # then click the first visible match. Retries up to 2 times.
   210‚Üí        submit_selectors = [
   211‚Üí            'button:has-text("Êèê‰∫§")',
   212‚Üí            ':has-text("Êèê‰∫§"):not(body):not(div:has(div:has-text("Êèê‰∫§")))',
   213‚Üí            'text=Êèê‰∫§',
   214‚Üí            '[class*="submit"]',
   215‚Üí            '[class*="btn"]:has-text("Êèê‰∫§")',
   216‚Üí            'a:has-text("Êèê‰∫§")',
   217‚Üí            'div:has-text("Êèê‰∫§"):not(:has(div:has-text("Êèê‰∫§")))',
   218‚Üí        ]
   219‚Üí
   220‚Üí        max_submit_retries = 2
   221‚Üí        for submit_attempt in range(1 + max_submit_retries):
   222‚Üí            submit_btn = None
   223‚Üí            matched_selector = None
   224‚Üí
   225‚Üí            # Try all selectors concurrently by launching tasks
   226‚Üí            async def _try_selector(sel):
   227‚Üí                try:
   228‚Üí                    elem = await page.wait_for_selector(sel, timeout=3000)
   229‚Üí                    if elem and await elem.is_visible():
   230‚Üí                        return elem, sel
   231‚Üí                except Exception:
   232‚Üí                    pass
   233‚Üí                return None, None
   234‚Üí
   235‚Üí            tasks = [asyncio.create_task(_try_selector(sel)) for sel in submit_selectors]
   236‚Üí            for coro in asyncio.as_completed(tasks):
   237‚Üí                elem, sel = await coro
   238‚Üí                if elem:
   239‚Üí                    submit_btn = elem
   240‚Üí                    matched_selector = sel
   241‚Üí                    # Cancel remaining tasks
   242‚Üí                    for t in tasks:
   243‚Üí                        t.cancel()
   244‚Üí                    break
   245‚Üí
   246‚Üí            if submit_btn and matched_selector:
   247‚Üí                logger.debug(f"Quick contact: found submit button with selector: {matched_selector}")
   248‚Üí                break
   249‚Üí
   250‚Üí            if submit_attempt < max_submit_retries:
